description_long: This is a striking ring featuring a large, faceted blue gemstone as its centerpiece, flanked by two smaller, clear stones on either side. The band is a simple, smooth metallic loop, likely made of a dark-colored metal such as black gold or oxidized silver, providing a modern contrast to the brilliance of the stones. The central blue gem is cut in a classic round or oval shape, with multiple facets that catch and reflect light. The two side stones are smaller, clear, and appear to be marquise or pear-shaped, adding elegance and balance to the overall design. The setting is prong-based, securely holding each stone in place while maximizing their visibility. This ring exudes a sophisticated, contemporary style suitable for both formal and everyday urban wear.
description: A modern ring with a large blue gemstone centerpiece and two smaller clear side stones set on a dark metallic band. The design is elegant and striking, with a prong setting that highlights the brilliance of the gems.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large blue central gemstone and two clear side stones, with the full circular band visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the height and prong setting of the blue gemstone, with the band appearing as a thin vertical line.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the blue gemstone and clear side stones, with the band forming a complete circle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view to view 1, again showing the gemstone's height and prong setting, with the band as a thin line.
